subtitles.original: 響き鳴り渡れ 希望の音
subtitles.english: Resonate and ring out, sound of hope

subtitles.original: 「信ずる事」を諦めないと
subtitles.english: Saying, "I won't give up on believing"

subtitles.original: 唄え
subtitles.english: Sing!

subtitles.original: 可能性に
subtitles.english: To the possibilities,

subtitles.original: ゼロはない
subtitles.english: there is no zero.

subtitles.original: 飛べよ
subtitles.english: Fly!

subtitles.original: この
subtitles.english: Into this

subtitles.original: 奇跡に
subtitles.english: miracle,

subtitles.original: 光あれ
subtitles.english: let there be light!

subtitles.original: コムハワリゾートへようこそ！
subtitles.english: Welcome to Comhwa Resort!

subtitles.original: わし、わし、わし、わし、わしが行く！
subtitles.english: I-I-I-I-I'm going!

subtitles.original: コムハワリゾートとは、わしのことだ！
subtitles.english: Comhwa Resort is all about me!

subtitles.original: みんな、ライブを観てくれてありぺこ！
subtitles.english: Everyone, thank you so much for watching the live show, aripeko!

subtitles.original: この後、10時15分よりメンバー限定アンコールLIVEがあるぺこ！
subtitles.english: After this, starting at 10:15 PM, we have a member-only encore live show, peko!

subtitles.original: まだまだぺこらの新衣装見たいぺこだよね？
subtitles.english: You still want to see more of Pekora's new outfit, right?

subtitles.original: ぺこらも歌も歌いたいし、みんなに新衣装もっと見てほしい！
subtitles.english: Pekora wants to sing more, and I want everyone to see my outfit even more!

subtitles.original: なので是非とも遊びに来てぺこ！
subtitles.english: So please come and hang out with me, peko!

subtitles.original: そして、グッズのおさらいです！
subtitles.english: And now, let's review the merchandise!

subtitles.original: 1つ目は、アクリルパネル！
subtitles.english: First up is the acrylic panel!

subtitles.original: こちらはなんと、ホロライブEnglishの一伊那尓栖ちゃんが描き下ろしてくれました！
subtitles.english: This one was actually illustrated by Ninomae Ina'nis from Hololive English!

subtitles.original: ありがとう、イナ！本当に可愛いぺこーら、かっこいいしオシャレだし！
subtitles.english: Thank you, Ina! It's a super cute, cool, and stylish Pekora!

subtitles.original: 是非ともゲットしてみてぺこな！
subtitles.english: Please make sure to get one, peko!

subtitles.original: 2つ目は、こちら！
subtitles.english: Second is this one!

subtitles.original: ランダムアクリルキーホルダー！
subtitles.english: Random acrylic keyholders!

subtitles.original: イラストは、まむえり先生に描いてもらいました！
subtitles.english: The illustrations were drawn by Mamueri-sensei!

subtitles.original: いや、最高なキーホルダー来ました、こちら！
subtitles.english: Wow, these are the absolute best keyholders right here!

subtitles.original: 「7」をやっぱり3つ揃えたいのが人間のサガなのかな？
subtitles.english: I guess it's human nature to want to get three '7's aligned?

subtitles.original: どう、ぺこなんでしょうか？
subtitles.english: What do you think, peko?

subtitles.original: 是非とも何が届くか、お楽しみに！
subtitles.english: Please look forward to finding out which one you get!

subtitles.original: そして3つ目は、
subtitles.english: And thirdly...

subtitles.original: ぺこら直筆の「うそぺこでしょ…」Tシャツ！
subtitles.english: A 'Uso peko desho...' T-shirt handwritten by Pekora!

subtitles.original: 大人気の直筆Tシャツ「うそぺこでしょ」出ました！
subtitles.english: The super popular handwritten T-shirt 'You're lying, peko?!' is here!

subtitles.original: 部屋着にね、ぴったりだと思うぺこだし、ま、
subtitles.english: I think it's absolutely perfect for loungewear, and...

subtitles.original: 「うそぺこでしょ」Tシャツで是非とも外に出かけるのも全然アリぺこだと思うので、
subtitles.english: it's also totally fine to wear the 'Uso peko' T-shirt when going out!

subtitles.original: 是非チェックしてみてください！
subtitles.english: So please check it out!

subtitles.original: そして4つ目は、
subtitles.english: And fourthly...

subtitles.original: トラックジャケット！
subtitles.english: The track jacket!

subtitles.original: キービジュアルのぺこらが着ているのと同じぺこ！
subtitles.english: It's the exact same one Pekora is wearing in the key visual, peko!

subtitles.original: 是非ともぺこらとお揃いで着ませんか？
subtitles.english: Won't you match outfits with Pekora?

subtitles.original: かっこいいしね、なんかオシャレじゃない？
subtitles.english: It looks cool and pretty stylish, don't you think?

subtitles.original: こちらもね、コンビニ行くときでもいいし、それとも
subtitles.english: You can wear it to go to the convenience store, or

subtitles.original: 遊びに行くときでもいい、部屋着にしてもいい！
subtitles.english: wear it when going out, or even as loungewear!

subtitles.original: もうね、たくさん着てもらえたら嬉しいぺこなんで、要チェックな！
subtitles.english: I'd be so happy if you wear it a lot, so check it out!

subtitles.original: そして、こちらのグッズフルセットでご購入いただきますと、
subtitles.english: And if you purchase the full merchandise set...

subtitles.original: 数量限定で、ぺこらの直筆サイン＆複製メッセージ入りポストカードがついてくる！
subtitles.english: you will receive a postcard with my handwritten signature and printed message in limited quantities!

subtitles.original: 是非ともお手にとってください！
subtitles.english: Please make sure to get your hands on it!

subtitles.original: ビッビッビッ！ばっばっばっばっばっ！うりゃりゃりゃりゃりゃりゃ！
subtitles.english: Bip-bip-bip! Bap-bap-bap-bap-bap! Uryaryaryaryarya!

subtitles.original: ハリー！最高だ！
subtitles.english: Hurry! This is awesome!

subtitles.original: 待ていましたこの瞬間！
subtitles.english: I've been waiting for this moment!

subtitles.original: いいですいいですめちゃいいです！
subtitles.english: It's good! It's so good!

subtitles.original: はっはっはっはっ！
subtitles.english: Hahahaha!

subtitles.original: おいえー！おいえー！
subtitles.english: Oi-yea! Oi-yea!

subtitles.original: きたきたきたきたきた！
subtitles.english: Here it comes, here it comes!

subtitles.original: うー、さばら！
subtitles.english: Woo, sabara!

subtitles.original: あげあげ！ハリケーン！
subtitles.english: Pump it up! Hurricane!

subtitles.original: くるのかい？消えてしまうのか？
subtitles.english: Is it coming? Is it going to disappear?

subtitles.original: ゴー！ゴー！
subtitles.english: Go! Go!

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation Thought Process**

Alright, let's get this done. The task is clear: synchronized subtitles in JSON format for this video segment. I need to take the video and the JSON with lyrics, and the target output will be a JSON with a list of subtitles in a particular structure. The content has been segmented.

I start by analyzing the video into segments:

*   Segment 1, from 00:00 to 00:27, is vocal music, and I have lyrics from the provided JSON. I'll need to double-check the timing of those lyrics and make sure they align with what I hear. The vocal part stops at 00:14.000 so instrumental till 00:27 doesn't need subtitling.
*   Segment 2 (00:27-01:03) looks like it's mostly visual with some sound effects. I should carefully listen, and if any text appears on-screen, I'll subtitle it. I'll need to determine what is prominent and relevant enough to subtitle.
*   Segment 3 (01:03-03:11) seems to be Pekora talking, and this is where it gets a bit more involved. The JSON doesn't provide speech transcripts here, so I'll need to transcribe her speech manually, translate it, and ensure I nail the timings. That will require me to carefully listen to each utterance.
*   Segment 4 (03:11 onwards) is a bit tricky. The audio sounds like Pekora shouting over BGM. I'll need to transcribe it as well, and make sure to capture the timing of her exclamations or possibly it's call and response chants, and this will be important to catch the timing.

Now, let's go into these segments:

*   **Segment 1 Analysis:** I'll listen closely to "RADIANT FORCE - part 1" and meticulously verify the lyrics from the JSON, refine the timecodes, and make sure that my translation is correct and matches what she's singing.
*   **Segment 2 Analysis:** Now it's the "PekoTime" segment. I'll listen for any prominent visual text. I've noted that text appears at 00:50.000 (ガッハッハ) and 00:53.000 (PEKO TIME). I need to determine if they're relevant enough to warrant subtitles. Considering the request, it's about dialogue, so "PEKO TIME" isn't important.
*   **Segment 3 Analysis:** Time to transcribe Pekora! I'll break her speech down to short segments and go through each utterance, taking time to hear and translate what she says. I'll work on transcribing, translating, and matching up the timings for each phrase. I'll double-check my work because I've only got one shot!
*   **Segment 4 Analysis:** "RADIANT FORCE - part 2". This is where I'll pay very close attention. I'll listen and take notes so I can figure out the words that are spoken, and also the timing.

After the analysis, I'll take all this information and begin formatting the output according to the `default_api:final_result` specification. No CC tags like `[laughter]`. I'll keep each line to 50 characters or less, pay close attention to the timing to the millisecond, and make sure the data is structured correctly. I'm ready to render a polished JSON response!
